mcpServers.name: dev-server
mcpServers.description: Next.js 開発サーバ。Playwright E2E の実行時にこのサーバを起動してテスト対象ページを提供します。
mcpServers.usage: Start this server before running Playwright tests so the app is available at http://localhost:3000

mcpServers.name: playwright
mcpServers.description: Playwright を用いた E2E 実行環境。Chromium/Firefox/WebKit でテストを実行できます。
mcpServers.startCommand: npx playwright install --with-deps && npx playwright test
mcpServers.usage: Used to run E2E tests against the dev-server. Ensure dev-server is running and reachable at http://host.docker.internal:3000 (or container networking equivalent).

howToRun: Copilot CLI: /mcp (or use the copilot CLI 'mcp' subcommand) to manage MCP servers if your local Copilot supports it.
Manual (Docker): Start dev-server container mounting the repo at /workspace and run npm run dev; then start the playwright container and run npx playwright test.
Playwright config: Ensure playwright.config.ts (if present) points to the correct baseURL (http://localhost:3000) or use --project/--grep flags as needed.
notes.notesForMaintainers: Images and commands are suggestions. Adjust node/playwright image tags to match CI requirements. Set secrets (OPENAI_API_KEY, NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_*) as needed in the MCP environment or CI secrets.
